subcodes.first_line: O wanderer in the desert of the love of God! For some time no letter hath outwardly been sent, nor any message or messenger dispatched [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته بادیه محبت الله چندی بود که بظاهر نامه ارسال نشد و پیامی و پیکی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @poems and quotation from poetry, @martyrs and martyrdom
